Private proposal for Kiana Realty

Build a premium property business that feels effortless to the buyer — and measurable to the team.

A Kiana-branded growth platform combining a resort-style property website, CRM, site-visit operations, field-team app, customer communication, marketing automation and AI-native workflows — operated by Insignia as a customer-success partner until Kiana chooses to bring more of the process in-house.

Explore phased rollout → See business workflows
Premium discoveryLocation-led storytelling for villas, land, retreats and suburban growth properties.
Admin-first engineCRM, lead qualification, visits, follow-ups, campaigns and closure workflow.
Partner-led operationsInsignia can run the system as a managed business-in-a-box while Kiana focuses on real estate.

From enquiry to confident site visit.

Every property enquiry is captured, qualified, matched with options, scheduled, followed up and measured — without forcing Rushikesh to immediately hire and train a large operations team.

Prepared for rhushikesh@kianarealty.com↗
Insignia Consultancy Solutions · Customer Success Proposal Kiana Realty Growth Platform

What we heard

Rushikesh is not asking for a website. He is asking for a lean, scalable real-estate operating system.

The discussion made one thing clear: Kiana wants to grow without copying the traditional model of high fixed manpower, scattered calling, manual WhatsApp coordination and untracked follow-ups. The solution must make the website the first intent-capture point, but the real value must sit in the admin, CRM, visit, field and outreach layers.

Lean business model

Kiana wants the right technology and a lean operating model, not a shop-and-staff-heavy structure. We therefore start with managed technology plus managed operations, and allow Kiana to gradually internalize roles when the process is stable.

Lower fixed overheadLess hiring risk

Dynamic inventory

The inventory is not one product. It includes land, apartments, villas, vacation-style retreats and regional opportunities. The platform must tag, organize and present this inventory by location, lifestyle, budget, availability and buyer intent.

LandVillasRetreats

Lead-to-closure discipline

The current flow depends on calls, regional team judgment and repeated follow-up. The proposed system makes every enquiry, call, booking, visit, objection, alternate property and next action visible in one place.

CRMVisitsFollow-up

Proposal approach: use Insignia’s existing technology, CRM, AI, digital marketing and workflow delivery experience to create a premium Kiana-owned platform and operating model.

Design reference: resort-style luxury property presentation with warm CTA design, visual storytelling, location-led discovery and concierge-style conversion.

Proposal design principle

Start small, create visible confidence, then deepen the operating backbone.

The first release must show progress quickly: a premium website, curated property pages and CRM-lite. Each next release should improve one business bottleneck — lead leakage, visit coordination, field-team preparedness, campaign conversion, remote buyer confidence and AI-assisted scale.

✓

Buyer trust first

Make Kiana look premium, organized and credible before asking the buyer to talk or visit.

↗

Operational control

Every enquiry, visit, call, note, document and property option becomes traceable.

◎

Managed success

Insignia can operate the system and processes initially, reducing training and hiring pressure.

AI

Future-ready AI

AI features are introduced when workflows and data are mature enough to produce reliable outcomes.

Customer-facing experience

Aspirational discovery for big-ticket villas, retreats and growth properties.

The public website should feel closer to a premium resort and curated villa advisory experience than a crowded listing portal. The buyer must immediately understand where to explore, why Kiana has curated these options, how to schedule a visit, and how to compare alternatives.

Location-led pages

Lonavala/Khandala for hill villas, Alibaug for coastal estates, Karjat for farmhouses and nature retreats, Panvel/Navi Mumbai for growth corridor homes, and Virar/Vasai for value suburban options.

Lifestyle-led discovery

Weekend retreats, senior living, investment land, gated villas, rental-yield assets, family upgrade homes and portfolio-worthy premium properties.

Property detail pages

Large visuals, short video, 360-style walkthrough, map, key highlights, consultation CTA, visit booking, downloadable brochure and similar options.

“I want” journey

A guided path where the buyer states intent: I want a villa, land, farmhouse, second home, investment property or site visit — and the system routes the enquiry into the right workflow.

Visual directionFull-bleed hero imagery, warm villa lighting, white floating navigation, orange CTAs, cream panels, premium cards and location storytelling.
DiscoverBuyer lands on a cinematic Kiana page from web, campaign, WhatsApp or referral.
ExploreBuyer filters by location, lifestyle, budget band and property type.
ConsultBuyer requests a call, video consultation, WhatsApp contact or visit slot.
VisitField team receives schedule, customer context and alternate property options.
Close / nurtureNegotiation, documents, follow-up, alternatives or drip nurture continue from CRM.
The real engineThe public website creates trust. The admin CRM creates consistency, speed, accountability and closure discipline.

Admin CRM and operations cockpit

The admin portion is the most important part of the platform.

Kiana’s team needs one cockpit for call center, admin, regional sales, site visits, property inventory, campaign operations and follow-up. The system should act as CRM, lead generator, inventory manager, scheduling engine and performance dashboard.

L

Lead intake

Website forms, WhatsApp, calls, campaigns, social, spreadsheet imports and manual leads flow into one lead record.

Q

Qualification

Budget, location, timeline, property type, intent, language, visit readiness and preferred contact channel.

P

Property inventory

Listings, media, owner/broker source, legal status, visit readiness, tags, alternatives and publish status.

V

Visit scheduling

Calendar, regional executive assignment, reminders, slot coordination and outcome capture.

C

Campaign cockpit

Segments, newsletters, drip campaigns, warm lead queues, voice/WhatsApp/email outreach and source tracking.

D

Dashboards

Lead source, visit conversion, active follow-ups, agent performance, property demand and campaign response.

Business-in-a-box model

Kiana can choose how much to operate internally and how much to let Insignia manage.

The proposal is not a one-time vendor delivery. It is a customer-success partnership. Insignia can provide technology, branding, marketing execution, CRM hygiene, campaign operations, lead qualification support, reporting and rollout governance. Kiana can later deploy its own team into the same system once the workflows are proven.

Insignia-operated launch

Insignia runs setup, data hygiene, campaign execution, CRM configuration, reporting and onboarding so Rushikesh does not need to immediately build a large technology or operations team.

  • Faster launch
  • Lower training load
  • Better early discipline

Kiana-owned platform

Kiana owns the deployed instance, customer data, property inventory, branding, roles and processes. The platform becomes Kiana’s business operating layer, not a temporary agency dashboard.

  • Owned data
  • Branded experience
  • Team readiness

Gradual transfer option

Once stable, Kiana can place internal sales, admin and field resources into the same workflow. Insignia then continues as technology, automation, AI and growth partner.

  • Train and transfer
  • Hybrid operations
  • Long-term scale

Architecture

A single-window Kiana experience, powered by Insignia beneath the surface.

To Kiana’s customers and team, the solution should feel unified: Kiana website, Kiana CRM, Kiana visit workflow, Kiana AI concierge. Under the hood, Insignia can connect best-in-class accelerators, APIs and services, but the customer experience remains cohesive and branded.

Customer touchpoints

Website, landing pages, property detail pages, WhatsApp, video consultation, enquiry forms and visit requests.

→

Insignia workflow layer

Lead capture, event routing, CRM data model, property matching, campaign triggers, notifications and feature flags.

→

Kiana operating cockpit

Admin CRM, call center, field app, customer portal, reports, AI assistance, documents, closures and customer success governance.

Phased rollout

Each phase delivers a visible business outcome, not just a technical milestone.

The rollout is designed to start with a compelling launch and then deepen operations step by step. Every phase has a confidence gate: Kiana sees what changed, what is working, what data is flowing, and what should be improved before the next investment.

Trust Launch Operations Backbone Growth Engine Field Intelligence Premium Experience AI Layer Scale & Ownership
Phase · Trust Launch

Premium website + CRM-lite MVP

Create the visible Kiana experience and the first internal discipline layer.

Business outcome

  • Kiana appears premium, organized and advisory-led.
  • Every web enquiry becomes a lead record.
  • Rushikesh can see property interest and follow-up status from day one.

Buyer visual narrative

  • Resort-style hero and location pages.
  • Explore villas, land, retreats and growth homes.
  • Book consultation or request site visit without confusion.

Technical deliverables

  • Responsive Kiana website / SPA.
  • Property listing and detail templates.
  • Lead capture forms and CRM-lite admin.
  • Basic notifications and source tracking.

What Kiana gets

  • A polished public presence.
  • Initial curated inventory online.
  • Basic admin lead and property management.
  • A foundation for all future phases.
Phase · Operations Backbone

CRM, call-center and site-visit engine

Convert informal follow-ups into a measurable lead-to-visit-to-closure process.

Business outcome

  • Lead leakage reduces because every lead has stage, owner and next action.
  • Visit scheduling becomes visible and coordinated.
  • Management sees where deals are stuck.

Team workflow

  • Presales qualifies the buyer.
  • Regional team receives clear visit context.
  • After visit, follow-up tasks and alternatives are created automatically.

Technical deliverables

  • Lead pipeline, assignment and task management.
  • Call notes, dispositions and reminders.
  • Visit calendar, slot coordination and outcome capture.
  • Basic dashboards for active leads and visits.

What Kiana gets

  • Call-center cockpit.
  • Admin operating discipline.
  • Site-visit management layer.
  • Sales follow-up memory across the team.
Phase · Growth Engine

Marketing automation and warm outreach

Shift effort from blind cold calling to segmented, trackable, warmed-up outreach.

Business outcome

  • Campaigns create warmer conversations.
  • Imported lead data is cleaned, segmented and nurtured.
  • Call team focuses on people who clicked, replied, visited, booked or showed intent.

Customer experience

  • Buyers receive relevant location/property content.
  • Messaging feels curated rather than random.
  • Interested buyers are routed to consultation, WhatsApp or visit booking.

Technical deliverables

  • Lead import, dedupe and segmentation.
  • Campaign journeys, landing pages and response tracking.
  • Newsletter-style and drip-style communication.
  • Warm lead queue and campaign reports.

What Kiana gets

  • Growth desk managed by data.
  • Campaign calendar and templates.
  • Lead source attribution.
  • Improved utilization of current marketing spend.
Phase · Field Intelligence

Regional team mobile app / PWA

Make the field team faster, better informed and more useful during site visits.

Business outcome

  • Ground team no longer depends only on scattered WhatsApp messages.
  • Customer visits become more prepared and professional.
  • New property acquisition data becomes structured.

On-site narrative

  • Executive sees today’s visits.
  • Shows primary property and nearby alternatives.
  • Captures customer objections, interest, photos and notes.

Technical deliverables

  • Field login, visit list and customer summary.
  • Property cards, maps and alternate options.
  • Photo/video capture and geotagged notes.
  • New property intake and draft listing workflow.

What Kiana gets

  • Field operating system.
  • Better visit outcomes.
  • Property acquisition discipline.
  • Real-time data from ground activity.
Phase · Premium Experience

Virtual tours, customer portal and document flow

Give serious buyers a premium remote evaluation and status experience.

Business outcome

  • Remote and outstation buyers can evaluate before travel.
  • High-intent buyers get better engagement after consultation.
  • Document and closure readiness becomes visible.

Buyer experience

  • Matterport-style walkthrough experience under Kiana branding.
  • Saved properties, visit status and shortlisted options.
  • Document uploads and closure checklist for serious buyers.

Technical deliverables

  • Virtual tour embeds and media checklist.
  • Customer portal/PWA for serious buyers.
  • Document center and status updates.
  • Property comparison and similar-property suggestions.

What Kiana gets

  • Premium remote sales layer.
  • Better buyer confidence before site visits.
  • Structured document management.
  • Higher-quality sales conversations.
Phase · AI Native Layer

Kiana AI concierge and intelligence engine

Introduce AI where it improves speed, qualification, matching and follow-up without weakening trust.

Business outcome

  • Inbound enquiries can be answered faster.
  • Sales team receives summaries and next-best actions.
  • Property matching becomes smarter as data improves.

AI interaction model

  • Inbound AI is prioritized because the buyer is already engaged.
  • Outbound voice is introduced carefully as warm callback, voice blast or IVR-led routing.
  • Human handoff remains available for serious conversations.

Technical deliverables

  • AI assistant trained on Kiana inventory and scripts.
  • AI summaries of calls, chats and visits.
  • Lead scoring and property recommendation rules.
  • Feature-flagged AI modules for controlled rollout.

What Kiana gets

  • AI-powered customer response.
  • AI-assisted sales productivity.
  • Better matching across locations and property categories.
  • Controlled, measurable automation.
Phase · Scale & Ownership

Managed success, training and long-term operating rhythm

Stabilize the platform, train Kiana’s team and keep improving business outcomes.

Business outcome

  • Kiana can scale without losing visibility.
  • Operations can remain Insignia-managed, Kiana-managed or hybrid.
  • Every new feature is tied to revenue, conversion or efficiency.

Success model

  • Regular review of leads, visits, conversions and bottlenecks.
  • SOPs for admin, sales, field and campaign operations.
  • Role-based training and access management.

Technical deliverables

  • Dashboards, governance cadence and reporting packs.
  • Role permissions and team onboarding.
  • Feature backlog and optimization roadmap.
  • Data ownership and export clarity.

What Kiana gets

  • A long-term customer-success partner.
  • Business operations support, not just software support.
  • Choice to operate lean or build internal team capacity.
  • A platform that keeps improving with the business.

Workflow library

What will happen in each major business workflow.

These workflows are meant to make the operating model easy to understand. The goal is to reduce ambiguity: who captures the lead, who qualifies it, who schedules the visit, who meets the customer, who follows up, and how management sees progress.

Lead to consultation

Buyer
Searches property→Views Kiana page→Submits interest
System
Creates lead→Tags intent→Routes to team
Team
Qualifies→Shares options→Books consult

Consultation to site visit

Sales
Confirms budget→Shortlists properties→Suggests visit windows
Admin
Assigns region→Schedules executive→Sends confirmation
Field
Receives visit card→Prepares options→Hosts visit

Site visit to closure

Field
Shows property→Shows alternatives→Logs feedback
CRM
Creates follow-up→Tracks interest→Moves stage
Closure
Negotiation→Documents→Deal or nurture

Inventory and property acquisition

Ground
Finds property→Captures media→Adds source
Admin
Verifies details→Tags inventory→Approves listing
Website
Publishes→Promotes→Feeds leads

Virtual property experience

Remote confidence before physical travel.

For villas and resort-style assets, buyers often need confidence before committing to travel. Kiana can offer premium visual walkthroughs, guided video consultation, comparison views, saved shortlists and document readiness — similar in experience to top global property visualization platforms, but delivered under Kiana’s own brand.

Visual walkthroughs

Property pages can include immersive walkthroughs, video tours, drone views, room/floor highlights and location context.

Customer portal

Serious buyers can log in to see saved properties, visit status, documents, messages, offers and closure checklists.

Matterport-style feelWe position the feature as a premium Kiana visual experience, not as a third-party handoff.

Value and ROI logic

Shift spend from leakage to a measurable growth engine.

Rushikesh already understands that real-estate growth can consume significant monthly spend in ads, calling, coordination and follow-up. The platform is designed so the same business effort becomes more trackable, reusable and scalable over time — while avoiding unnecessary early hiring.

Less waste in calling

Instead of calling every imported contact equally, campaigns and tracking identify people who opened, clicked, replied, booked or showed property intent.

Better use of team time

Presales, admin and field executives see exactly what they need: customer requirement, property options, appointment details and next follow-up.

Owned business memory

Every call, visit, property, document and campaign response becomes part of Kiana’s operating memory rather than disappearing inside WhatsApp threads.

“Your success guarantees our success. Insignia is not proposing a one-time software handover; we are proposing a customer-success partnership where technology, marketing, operations and business development move together.”Positioning for Rushikesh and Kiana Realty

Commercial model

Flexible INR engagement models, without forcing a large upfront commitment.

Exact commercial numbers can be finalized in the PPTX and contract stage. The SPA intentionally focuses on scope, value and rollout clarity. All pricing can be quoted in INR and structured to stay aligned with Kiana’s current growth-spend envelope while producing a more durable operating asset.

Phased build contribution

Kiana contributes phase by phase. Each phase has a defined deliverable, acceptance gate and business outcome.

Managed success retainer

Insignia operates selected workflows: CRM hygiene, campaigns, reporting, support desk and optimization cadence.

Hybrid success fee

For specific campaigns or leads, commercial upside can be linked to measurable business outcomes where attribution is clean.

Train-and-transfer

Kiana can later move admin, call-center or field operations in-house while Insignia remains technology and AI partner.

What makes the offer strong

Rushikesh gets a premium technology partner without carrying the full cost and risk of building a tech company.

Insignia brings the strategy, product thinking, UX, CRM, automation, AI, data and operations expertise. Kiana brings market knowledge, property relationships, regional teams and customer trust. The platform sits between both teams and makes the business stronger every month.

01

Fast visible launch

A premium website and CRM-lite launch creates immediate confidence.

02

Business operations depth

CRM, visits, campaigns and field workflows solve the real bottlenecks.

03

AI-ready scale

AI is introduced under control, with clear human handoff and measurable value.

Immediate decisions

Inputs needed to begin the first confidence launch.

The first phase can move quickly once we receive the minimum business inputs. The goal is to launch a useful and premium version first, then continuously improve property content, CRM depth and automation.

✓
Brand and domainKiana logo, preferred domain/subdomain, brand colors if any, and approval for premium resort-style visual direction.
✓
Initial property setCurated properties with photos/videos, location, rough budget band, ownership/source notes, visit readiness and legal status.
✓
Lead sourcesExisting lead spreadsheets, enquiry channels, WhatsApp/call process, campaign sources and current follow-up stages.
✓
Team rolesPresales, admin, regional executives, field team, property acquisition team and leadership dashboard users.
✓
Sales scriptsTypical call questions, qualification logic, property pitch, objection handling, languages and handoff rules.
✓
Commercial preferenceBuild-only, build-plus-managed-success, hybrid success fee, or staged train-and-transfer model.
